title: RSW Christmas Reindeer Water Bottle with Straw – 500ml Kids Bottle with Flip Top Spout – Fun Festive Christmas Design
features: FESTIVE KIDS WATER BOTTLE – 500ml bottle featuring an adorable reindeer print design – perfect for Christmas
EASY TO USE – Includes a flip-top spout and straw for mess-free drinking at home, school, or on the go
SAFE MATERIALS – Made from PET body and PP lid – completely BPA free for safe everyday use
PERFECT SIZE – Measures approximately 7.5 cm diameter x 16 cm high – great for little hands to hold
REUSABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY – A practical alternative to disposable bottles – ideal for water, juice, or squash
description: Keep little ones hydrated in festive style with the RSW Christmas Reindeer Bottle with Straw – 500ml. This charming Christmas water bottle is made from durable PET with a secure PP lid and features an adorable all-over reindeer print, making it perfect for kids during the holiday season. The flip-top spout design makes drinking easy and helps prevent spills, whether at home, school, or on the go. With a generous 500ml capacity, this bottle is ideal for water, juice, or other cold drinks and is a great size for little hands to hold. The BPA-free construction ensures safe use, and the festive design makes it an excellent stocking filler or everyday accessory throughout December. Practical, lightweight, and easy to clean, this reusable bottle is a great eco-friendly alternative to disposable drinks containers and will quickly become a Christmas favourite for kids of all ages.
